summary: Lane A SHC scheduled launch dispatched and produced an openagents_shc fallbackLeaseIntent, but production exposes no live SHC/fallback worker closeout route analogous to the Pylon worker closeout ingestion route. The work order remains accepted_free_slice with executionCloseout null.

closeDecision.reason: Full M10 acceptance requires Lane A terminal completion/decision evidence. This bundle advances Lane A to scheduled dispatch and Lane B to accepted live closeout, but does not prove SHC terminal closeout.
